hostnames.description: List of hostnames associated with the environment group; must be unique within Apigee and formatted as domain names.

name.description: Name of the Apigee environment group to be created or managed, required to be unique within the Apigee organization.

org_id.description: Specifies the Apigee organization ID where the environment group will be created.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for create, update, and delete operations for the Apigee environment group.
